nodes.title: Note
widgets_values: Image Crop --- - Image Crop (Auto): SegmentAnything is used for the subject detection. works best on subjects that don't fill the whole frame. - Image Crop (Custom): for images in landscape format where the subject fills the complete frame use the custom crop to decide what to crop. set the stop option in the Fast Bypasser in the Preview (Cropped Image) group to yes until you are happy with the crop, after that set the stop to no.

nodes.title: 🐍 Prompt Preview
widgets_values: A woman with long, fiery red hair cascading down her back stands in profile, her face painted in stark black and white makeup with exaggerated features-thick black eyebrows, a black nose, and a white smile with black lips. Her neck and shoulders are exposed, and she wears a black and white checkered crop top with ruffled edges. The lighting is dramatic, with deep shadows under her chin and along her jawline, highlighting the contrast of her painted face against the dark background. The mood is moody and theatrical, evoking a circus or gothic aesthetic.

## Model links

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

**model_patches**

- [Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/alibaba-pai/Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union/resolve/main/Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union.safetensors)


Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │      └── ae.safetensors
│   └── 📂 model_patches/
│          └── Z-Image-Turbo-Fun-Controlnet-Union.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values: Enable one of the Load Image groups and use the preprocessor group. --- Standard ControlNets - set Standard to yes in the Fast Muter and select the controlnet model that fits your checkpoint (SD15/SDXL/SD3/Flux) --- Union Models - enable Union Types (this enables the standard loader automaticly), select the Union ControlNet Model. --- Diffsynth: Qwen Image / Z-Image Turbo: - set everything in the Fast Muter to no and enable DiffSynth: Qwen / ZIT. - activate i2i (DiffSynth: Qwen / ZIT) in the initial render group. (seems to also work without it because the model is patched) - don't forget the change the model in the Model Patch Loader (Z-Image / Qwen). --- for flux, i wouldn't recommend using controlnets. instead, i would use the loras, because they use less memory. [Flux Depth Lora](https://civitai.com/models/970050/flux-tools-depth-lora) / [Flux Canny Lora](https://civitai.com/models/970090?modelVersionId=1086214) leave the denoise in the initial render group at 1.0 to use the controlnet only.

nodes.title: Prompt
widgets_values: Replace the person's face and hair in Image1 with the person's face and hair in Image2, without changing the clothing. All other people and areas remain completely unchanged. Match the expression, color grading, saturation, and tonal range of Image1 exactly — if Image1 is black and white, desaturated, or color-graded, the replaced face and hair must match that same look. Do not add colors to a black and white / monochrome / desaturated image.

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values: Image Size / Seed --- the image size is set here BUT when loading an image without using the Resize Image group. - the size in the preprocessor don't match for controlnets, but it is reduced to 1mp anyways before sending it to pp and the controlnet. - i2i (denoise) uses the input image as source and also it's resolution. - the image size doesn't matter when loading the image for the description only (image to prompt) when using the option configure_latent in the SmartLoader+ or Smart Model Loader - the latent size changes accordingly to what is used there (overwrites smart folder size and resize size). Seed - the seed is not used in the flow keep it disabled or fixed. otherwise the workflow starts from here everytime.

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values:
Important

---

ComfyUI's bypass mode can misalign output slots, bypassed nodes may pass values from the wrong output (e.g. height receives the width value instead of None).

- If you're not using this group, mute it instead of bypassing to prevent size overrides.

nodes.title: Note
widgets_values:
Video Frames --- Skip Frames is your starting point in the video, frame_load_cap defines the length (should be 1) to find a good frame in a video use the stop option in this group and - set Skip Frames to "increment" in the Input Video group. change the queue to run instant and stop it when you got the one you want. OR
- set Skip Frames to "fixed" in the Input Video group. change the frame_load_cap to e.g. 120 to see a selection of 120 frames in the preview and find your frame. in this case you have to calculate the skip frames: current Skip Frames value + selected image (index -1.)
- reset the frame_load_cap to 1 after all!
- Also, keep in mind that each image the Eclipse Preview Image node temporarily saves — or that you save via right-click → Save Image — contains the embedded workflow for drag-back support. These images are significantly larger as a result.
